reads.provenance: in-memory mock kStaff ValueNotifier (lib/screens/settings/staff_screens.dart ~30-42); selected by staffIndex route param and read at ~406-407 (kStaff.value[index]). No drift table, no repository read.

fields.name: phone
fields.note: StaffMember.phone (~23); currently the de-facto identity key used to look up perms and to filter on deactivate — no explicit id field exists as-built

fields.name: role
fields.note: StaffMember.role (~24), free-text label ('Owner'/'Cashier'/...); collapses to coarse owner|staff under S-4

fields.name: isOwner
fields.note: StaffMember.isOwner (~25); owner rows are not navigable to this screen

actions.name: viewStaffMember
actions.provenance: Screen open via context.push('/settings/staff/:index') from StaffScreen; resolves one StaffMember from kStaff by index.

payload.name: staffId
payload.note: as-built the list index / phone selects the member; a real backend id is expected

actions.name: setStaffActive
actions.provenance: Deactivate button (~504-522): showConfirmDialog then mutates kStaff in memory, removing the member by phone (~513-516), pops, shows snackbar '<name> deactivated'. Only deactivate is wired as-built (active=false); activate is the symmetric coarse-model action.

payload.name: staffId
payload.note: as-built keyed by StaffMember.phone; backend uses a real Staff id

payload.name: active
payload.note: false on deactivate; true on reactivate

supersededElements.name: granularPermissionMatrix
supersededElements.note: static const _defaults per-staff permission toggles, rendered as ToggleRows (~475-481) and session-persisted per member in kStaffPerms keyed by phone (~410-413). SUPERSEDED-BY-S-4: backend does NOT implement per-permission flags; these collapse to coarse role owner|staff (staff can read/write debts+customers; cannot delete debts, manage staff, or touch billing/payout/subscription). Recorded here for provenance only — do NOT synthesize permission-flag fields or endpoints.

authContext.note: Staff management is owner-only per conventions.md (staff cannot manage staff). Screen reachable only from the owner-facing Staff & roles settings surface.

supersededNote: granular permission map superseded by S-4
